commands.review_summary:
The PR strips leading echoed inbound metadata from outbound reply payload text before reply-directive parsing and adds sanitizer/outbound regression coverage for known, location, and custom metadata labels.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +114, Docs +1. Total +124 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends payload.text into parseReplyDirectives before any inbound metadata stripping, while the prompt producer emits JSON metadata blocks that can be echoed by a model and then projected to channel delivery. I did not run a local runtime reproduction because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining work is a concrete branch repair: rebase, preserve current sanitizer behavior, broaden generated-label coverage, remove the changelog entry, and update focused tests.
